case_title: SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR - INVESTIGATION UNIT VS. SADAT FAWZI MOUSA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR - INVESTIGATION UNIT AS TO DEFENDANT MOUSA, SADAT FAWZI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-26-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.99 SERVED APR-11-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MOUSA, SADAT FAWZI
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR - INVESTIGATION UNIT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-26-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-26-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CHARLES SMITH--SF TAX COLLECTOR--INVESTIGATION. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-26-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR - INVESTIGATION UNIT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOUSA, SADAT FAWZI $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,045.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-03-2015 ORDERED DESTROYED
